meta.title: Infinite Mathle practice, unlimited arithmetic Wordle puzzles
meta.description: Play Infinite Mathle whenever you want another number puzzle. Practice addition and subtraction logic with unlimited browser-generated challenges.
seo.heading: Infinite Mathle
seo.intro: Infinite Mathle lets you keep playing new arithmetic puzzles whenever you want. It is the practice mode for testing strategies and warming up mental math.
seo.feature: The Infinite mode creates browser-side puzzle seeds. Start a new puzzle any time and keep your practice separate from the daily and hourly schedules.
seo.rhythm: Use Infinite mode when you want to experiment with opening guesses, learn the feedback colors, or play several Mathle rounds in a row.
